feed.title: Aroostook County Registry of Deeds
feed.subtitle: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. Covers both Northern (Fort Kent) and Southern (Houlton) Districts, which share this parent page. Sitewide /feed/ exists but is not registry-specific. KNOWN ISSUE: aroostook.me.us has been returning HTTP 403 to this bot's requests (likely WAF bot-blocking) since mid-2026; kept enabled so the status dashboard surfaces it and it recovers automatically if the block is lifted. [STALE: source last verified 2026-07-05T10:23:12.642509+00:00; 16 consecutive fetch failures since — items below may be out of date.]

entry.title: Monitoring started: Aroostook County Registry of Deeds
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
